query: SELECT p.id, p.titulo, LEFT(p.relatorioAnalise, 50) as relatorio_preview, c.name as colaborador_name, c.email as colaborador_email, l.name as leader_name, l.email as leader_email FROM pdis p JOIN users c ON p.colaboradorId = c.id LEFT JOIN users l ON c.leaderId = l.id WHERE (p.relatorioAnalise IS NOT NULL AND p.relatorioAnalise != '') OR (p.relatorioArquivoUrl IS NOT NULL AND p.relatorioArquivoUrl != '');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT p.id, p.titulo, LEFT(p.relatorioAnalise, 50) as relatorio_preview, c.name as colaborador_name, c.email as colaborador_email, l.name as leader_name, l.email as leader_email FROM pdis p JOIN users c ON p.colaboradorId = c.id LEFT JOIN users l ON c.leaderId = l.id WHERE (p.relatorioAnalise IS NOT NULL AND p.relatorioAnalise != '') OR (p.relatorioArquivoUrl IS NOT NULL AND p.relatorioArquivoUrl != '');
